name: Q&A Panel UI
summary: Frontend panel for displaying agent questions and collecting user responses
goals: Render agent questions with options or free-text input
Display previous Q&A exchanges in the conversation

specDetail.description: UI components (AskUserQuestionPanel, AskUserQuestionCard, QAResultCard) that display questions from the agent and collect user responses. Supports multiple choice options, free-text input, and displays completed Q&A exchanges.

parameters.name: allowCustom
parameters.description: Whether the user can provide a custom answer

parameters.name: onAnswer
parameters.description: Callback invoked with the user's answer

constraints: Must render question immediately when received from the agent stream
Must disable the message input while a question is pending response
Must show a visual distinction between pending and answered questions

acceptanceCriteria.given: the agent asks a question with predefined options
acceptanceCriteria.then: the question and clickable options are displayed, and the agent pauses until the user responds

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
